offer: For logistics operations managers processing 10-20 shipments/week, inaccurate inventory records cause late shipments. We automate weekly inventory reconciliation reports instead of manual reconciliation spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate inventory records lead to late shipments and customer dissatisfaction.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics managers
Indie Hackers posts on inventory management workflows
DM outreach to logistics managers with demo video
Community forums for logistics tools discussions
try_it: Let users try manual entry for initial data input and weekly report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
